pi_items.source: Task description directly specifies the field name 'Employee ID'.
Task description specifies creating a 'User Custom Field', which correctly maps to the OpenProject 'UserCustomField' class.
Task description requests a 'Text field'. Code analysis of OpenProject source code confirms the format string for short text is 'string'.
The setup_openproject.sh script initializes the user 'Alice Johnson' with the login 'alice.johnson'.
Task description explicitly asks to set the Employee ID to 'EMP-9901'.

privileged_info_summary: The task environment uses synthetic data initialized via setup_openproject.sh, which creates a user named 'Alice Johnson' with the login 'alice.johnson'. The task requires creating a 'User Custom Field' named 'Employee ID', corresponding to the OpenProject 'UserCustomField' class and the 'string' internal format (for a Text field). The instructions specify setting this field's value to 'EMP-9901' for Alice Johnson. All verified values align perfectly with the environment initialization scripts and task description.
